description: Lifecycle state for templates/common — the L1 base layer propagated to all co-* variants

propagated_skills.description: Tracks which common_skills from common-contract.json are physically present in each L2 variant's skills/ directory
propagated_skills.note: After B-01 sync, all variants should have all 8 skills. Update this section if a variant intentionally excludes a skill.
